prompt: Create a moody monochrome overhead photo-realistic scene of a late-night artist workspace: a textured off-white sheet of drawing paper lies diagonally on a worn gray desk, holding an unfinished graphite portrait of a young woman with shoulder-length wavy dark hair, bare shoulder, and a black camisole strap. The drawing is highly detailed in the hair, neck, shoulder, and clothing, with visible layered graphite strokes, smudging, paper grain, and soft unfinished shading. A realistic right hand enters from the lower right, actively drawing with a black pencil near the portrait’s cheek and neck area. Place a black smartphone at the upper right showing the matching black-and-white reference photo of the same subject. Add exactly two opaque soft-edged gray privacy rectangles: one large square covering the face in the pencil portrait and one smaller rectangle covering the face on the phone screen. Surround the paper with a believable artist’s desk arrangement: one metal pencil sharpener near the top, one kneaded eraser or small stone near the bottom, one open pencil tin at the lower left, five loose black graphite pencils, two brushes, and two metallic drawing tools scattered naturally around the paper. Use dim warm desk-lamp lighting, deep shadows, subtle vignette, intimate private-work-in-progress atmosphere, realistic paper texture, charcoal and graphite tones, shallow depth of field, high-resolution editorial photography style, no visible text.
